market_overview.headline: Broad market weakness with SPY breaking down, QQQ unstacked, and BTC in full bear structure signaling risk-off conditions.
market_overview.detail: Only 27% of stocks in Full Bull while 37.6% are in bear structures (Full Bear + Bearish unstacked), with major indices showing deteriorating EMA alignment and breakdown risks.

momentum_themes.headline: Sector Rotation into Commodities & Infrastructure
momentum_themes.detail: Energy minerals and non-energy minerals leading with 100% bullish participation, while traditional growth tech remains under pressure. Infrastructure and commodity plays showing persistent momentum acceleration.

sector_analysis.headline: Clear Sector Divergence

strongest.note: Perfect bullish participation with strong momentum across energy commodities.
Mining and metals showing complete uptrend dominance despite recent pullbacks.
Logistics and distribution names benefiting from supply chain normalization.

weakest.note: Tech services decimated with 19 of 21 names in bearish structures.
Complete bearish breakdown across business services sector.
Banking sector struggling with nearly half in bearish structures.

sector_analysis.detail: Sharp rotation from growth tech into old economy sectors, with commodities and energy leading while traditional growth faces structural headwinds.

items.text: SPY showing Bull Breakdown with bearish cross risk on both 8W/13W and 13W/21W levels
QQQ already unstacked bearish with tech sector showing -90% net scores
BTC in Full Bear at -46% below fair value, suggesting continued risk-off environment
46 stocks in Bull Breakdown phase indicating widespread uptrend deterioration
